findings.description: s7 states "errorsタグが全エラーをリスト表示するのに対し" but the source shows errorsタグ has a `filter` attribute with values `all` (全てのメッセージ) and `global` (入力項目に対応しないメッセージのみ). The tag does not unconditionally show "全エラー" — it depends on the filter setting.
findings.source_evidence: filter属性: "all(全てのメッセージを表示する) / global(入力項目に対応しないメッセージのみを表示) / デフォルトはall"

findings.description: s1 content references `ExtendedValidation_yyyymmddConvertor`, `ExtendedValidation_yyyymmConvertor`, and `WebView_CustomTagConfig` — all important ref names a user might search by — but none appear in s1's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: 「:ref:`ExtendedValidation_yyyymmddConvertor`」「:ref:`ExtendedValidation_yyyymmConvertor`」「:ref:`WebView_CustomTagConfig`」 are all mentioned in the yyyymmdd/yyyymm format description.

findings.description: s6 hints include `nablarch_errors` and `nablarch_error` but omit `nablarch_info` and `nablarch_warn`, which are the default CSS class names for the `infoCss` and `warnCss` attributes defined in the attributes table.
findings.source_evidence: infoCss: デフォルトは"nablarch_info" / warnCss: デフォルトは"nablarch_warn"
